targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT asteroid_id) AS "Total NEOs" FROM neo_close_approaches WHERE close_approach_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Hazardous" FROM neo_close_approaches WHERE is_potentially_hazardous = TRUE AND close_approach_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "On Sentry" FROM neo_agency_sentry WHERE status = 'active'
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "CAD Records" FROM neo_agency_cad
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Fireballs" FROM neo_fireball_events
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "ESA Risk" FROM neo_agency_esa WHERE on_risk_list = TRUE
SELECT metric_date AS "time", asteroid_count AS "Asteroid Count" FROM neo_daily_metrics WHERE metric_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() ORDER BY metric_date

SELECT metric_date AS "time", AVG(asteroid_count) OVER (ORDER BY metric_date ROWS BETWEEN 6 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS "7-Day Moving Avg" FROM neo_daily_metrics WHERE metric_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() ORDER BY metric_date

SELECT metric_date AS "time", avg_risk_score AS "Avg Risk Score", high_risk_count AS "High Risk Count" FROM neo_daily_metrics WHERE metric_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() ORDER BY metric_date

SELECT fullname AS "Object", impact_probability AS "Impact Prob", torino_scale AS "Torino", palermo_scale_cum AS "Palermo (Cum)", palermo_scale_max AS "Palermo (Max)", n_impacts AS "# Impacts", impact_date_range AS "Impact Years", energy_mt AS "Energy (MT)", diameter_km AS "Diameter (km)", v_impact_km_s AS "V Impact (km/s)", last_obs AS "Last Obs", cdate AS "Updated" FROM neo_sentry_watchlist LIMIT 50

panels.title: Active Sentry Watchlist (Top 50 by Palermo Scale)

targets.rawSql: SELECT WIDTH_BUCKET(palermo_scale_cum, -10, 0, 20) AS bucket, ROUND(((WIDTH_BUCKET(palermo_scale_cum, -10, 0, 20) - 1) * 0.5 - 10)::numeric, 1) ::text AS palermo_scale, COUNT(*) AS count FROM neo_agency_sentry WHERE status='active' AND palermo_scale_cum IS NOT NULL GROUP BY bucket ORDER BY bucket

SELECT CASE WHEN torino_scale = 0 THEN '0 - Normal' WHEN torino_scale = 1 THEN '1 - Normal (merits monitoring)' WHEN torino_scale BETWEEN 2 AND 4 THEN '2-4 - Meriting attention' WHEN torino_scale BETWEEN 5 AND 7 THEN '5-7 - Threatening' WHEN torino_scale BETWEEN 8 AND 10 THEN '8-10 - Certain Collision' ELSE 'Unknown' END AS category, COUNT(*) AS count FROM neo_agency_sentry WHERE status='active' GROUP BY category ORDER BY category

SELECT approach_date AS "Date", fullname AS "Object", ROUND(distance_au::numeric,5) AS "Distance (AU)", ROUND(v_rel_km_s::numeric,2) AS "V Rel (km/s)", ROUND(diameter_km::numeric,3) AS "Diameter (km)", h_mag AS "H Mag", t_sigma_f AS "σt", on_sentry_watchlist AS "On Sentry?", palermo_scale_cum AS "Palermo", esa_risk AS "ESA Risk" FROM neo_cad_upcoming LIMIT 100
SELECT approach_date AS "time", distance_au AS "Distance (AU)" FROM neo_agency_cad WHERE approach_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND distance_au < 0.05 ORDER BY approach_date
SELECT event_date AS "time", impact_energy_kt AS "Impact Energy (kt TNT)" FROM neo_fireball_events WHERE event_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() ORDER BY event_date

panels.title: Fireball Impact Energy Over Time (kt TNT)

targets.rawSql: SELECT event_date AS "Date", CONCAT(latitude, latitude_dir) AS "Lat", CONCAT(longitude, longitude_dir) AS "Lon", altitude_km AS "Alt (km)", velocity_km_s AS "Vel (km/s)", total_radiated_energy_j AS "Radiated (10^10 J)", impact_energy_kt AS "Energy (kt)" FROM neo_fireball_events ORDER BY impact_energy_kt DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 20

SELECT year, event_count AS "Events", ROUND(total_energy_kt::numeric,1) AS "Total Energy (kt)", ROUND(max_energy_kt::numeric,1) AS "Max Energy (kt)" FROM neo_fireball_annual ORDER BY year DESC LIMIT 30
SELECT orbit_class_name AS "Orbit Class", total AS "Count" FROM neo_orbit_class_dist LIMIT 10

SELECT WIDTH_BUCKET(moid_au, 0, 0.1, 20) AS bucket, ROUND((WIDTH_BUCKET(moid_au,0,0.1,20)-1)*0.005::numeric,3) ::text AS moid_au, COUNT(*) AS count FROM neo_agency_sbdb WHERE moid_au IS NOT NULL AND moid_au < 0.1 GROUP BY bucket ORDER BY bucket

SELECT WIDTH_BUCKET(diameter_km, 0, 10, 20) AS bucket, ROUND((WIDTH_BUCKET(diameter_km,0,10,20)-1)*0.5::numeric,1) ::text AS diameter_km, COUNT(*) AS count FROM neo_agency_sbdb WHERE diameter_km IS NOT NULL AND diameter_km < 10 GROUP BY bucket ORDER BY bucket

SELECT asteroid_id, sbdb_fullname AS "Name", orbit_class_name AS "Orbit Class", ROUND(sbdb_diameter_km::numeric,3) AS "Diameter (km)", ROUND(albedo::numeric,3) AS "Albedo", spectral_type AS "Spec Type", ROUND(moid_au::numeric,5) AS "MOID (AU)", ROUND(eccentricity::numeric,4) AS "e", ROUND(inclination_deg::numeric,2) AS "i (deg)", ROUND(semi_major_axis_au::numeric,4) AS "a (AU)", is_pha AS "PHA?", sentry_status AS "Sentry", esa_on_risk_list AS "ESA Risk" FROM neo_asteroid_profile WHERE sbdb_diameter_km IS NOT NULL ORDER BY sbdb_diameter_km DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 50

SELECT esa_designation AS "Designation", esa_name AS "Name", ROUND(diameter_m::numeric,0) AS "Diameter (m)", vi_date AS "VI Date", ip_max AS "IP Max", ps_max AS "PS Max", ts AS "TS", ROUND(vel_km_s::numeric,2) AS "Vel (km/s)", years AS "Impact Years", ip_cum AS "IP Cum", ps_cum AS "PS Cum" FROM neo_agency_esa WHERE on_risk_list = TRUE ORDER BY ps_max DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 50
SELECT ingestion_time AS "time", COUNT(*) AS "Records Ingested" FROM neo_agency_sbdb WHERE ingestion_time BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() GROUP BY date_trunc('hour', ingestion_time) ORDER BY 1

SELECT source AS "Source", COUNT(*) AS "Total", COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status_code = 404) AS "404 Count", COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE not_found_until > now()) AS "Cached Not-Found", MAX(last_checked_at) AS "Last Checked" FROM neo_agency_fetch_status GROUP BY source ORDER BY source

SELECT s.designation AS "Object", s.palermo_scale_cum AS "JPL Palermo", e.ps_cum AS "ESA Palermo", ROUND((s.palermo_scale_cum - e.ps_cum)::numeric, 2) AS "Δ Palermo", s.torino_scale AS "JPL TS", e.ts AS "ESA TS", ROUND(s.diameter_km::numeric, 3) AS "JPL Diam (km)", ROUND(e.diameter_m / 1000.0, 3) AS "ESA Diam (km)", s.impact_date_range AS "Impact Years" FROM neo_agency_sentry s JOIN neo_agency_esa e ON LOWER(e.esa_designation) = LOWER(s.designation) WHERE s.status = 'active' AND e.on_risk_list = TRUE ORDER BY s.palermo_scale_cum DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 50

panels.title: JPL Sentry vs ESA NEOCC — Risk Agreement

targets.rawSql: SELECT 'NeoWs' AS source, COUNT(DISTINCT asteroid_id) AS count FROM neo_close_approaches UNION ALL SELECT 'SBDB', COUNT(*) FROM neo_agency_sbdb UNION ALL SELECT 'Sentry (Active)', COUNT(*) FROM neo_agency_sentry WHERE status='active' UNION ALL SELECT 'CAD', COUNT(DISTINCT asteroid_id) FROM neo_agency_cad UNION ALL SELECT 'ESA Risk', COUNT(*) FROM neo_agency_esa WHERE on_risk_list = TRUE UNION ALL SELECT 'Fireball', COUNT(*) FROM neo_fireball_events ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT CASE WHEN cnt >= 3 THEN '3+ agencies' WHEN cnt = 2 THEN '2 agencies' ELSE '1 agency only' END AS coverage, COUNT(*) AS count FROM (SELECT n.asteroid_id, (CASE WHEN s.asteroid_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN sen.asteroid_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN e.asteroid_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS cnt FROM (SELECT DISTINCT asteroid_id FROM neo_close_approaches) n LEFT JOIN neo_agency_sbdb s ON s.asteroid_id = n.asteroid_id LEFT JOIN neo_agency_sentry sen ON sen.asteroid_id = n.asteroid_id LEFT JOIN neo_agency_esa e ON e.asteroid_id = n.asteroid_id) sub GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1 DESC

SELECT s.fullname AS "Object", ROUND(s.diameter_km::numeric, 3) AS "SBDB Measured (km)", ROUND(n.diam_max::numeric, 3) AS "NeoWs Estimated (km)", ROUND(ABS(s.diameter_km - n.diam_max)::numeric, 3) AS "Δ Diam (km)", s.orbit_class_name AS "Orbit Class", s.albedo AS "Albedo" FROM neo_agency_sbdb s JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT ON (asteroid_id) asteroid_id, estimated_diameter_km_max AS diam_max FROM neo_close_approaches ORDER BY asteroid_id, close_approach_date DESC) n ON n.asteroid_id = s.asteroid_id WHERE s.diameter_km IS NOT NULL AND n.diam_max IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ABS(s.diameter_km - n.diam_max) DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT semi_major_axis_au AS "a (AU)", eccentricity AS "e", CASE WHEN is_pha THEN 'PHA' ELSE 'Non-PHA' END AS "series", fullname AS "Object" FROM neo_agency_sbdb WHERE semi_major_axis_au IS NOT NULL AND eccentricity IS NOT NULL AND semi_major_axis_au < 5
SELECT ROUND(t_jup::numeric, 1) ::text AS t_jup, COUNT(*) AS count FROM neo_agency_sbdb WHERE t_jup IS NOT NULL AND t_jup BETWEEN 2 AND 7 GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT orbit_class_name AS "Class", total AS "Count", pha_count AS "PHA Count", ROUND(avg_moid_au::numeric, 5) AS "Avg MOID (AU)", ROUND(avg_eccentricity::numeric, 4) AS "Avg e", ROUND(avg_diameter_km::numeric, 3) AS "Avg Diam (km)", ROUND(avg_t_jup::numeric, 2) AS "Avg T_J" FROM neo_orbit_class_dist

SELECT time_bucket('1 month', close_approach_date) AS "time", COUNT(*) AS "Approaches", COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE is_potentially_hazardous) AS "Hazardous", MIN(miss_distance_astronomical::float) AS "Closest (AU)" FROM neo_close_approaches WHERE close_approach_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('3 months', approach_date) AS "time", MIN(distance_au) AS "Closest (AU)", COUNT(*) AS "Count" FROM neo_agency_cad WHERE approach_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
SELECT velocity_km_s AS "Velocity (km/s)", impact_energy_kt AS "Energy (kt)", event_date::text AS "Date" FROM neo_fireball_events WHERE velocity_km_s IS NOT NULL AND impact_energy_kt IS NOT NULL

SELECT event_date AS "Date", CONCAT(latitude, '° ', latitude_dir) AS "Lat", CONCAT(longitude, '° ', longitude_dir) AS "Lon", altitude_km AS "Alt (km)", velocity_km_s AS "Vel (km/s)", total_radiated_energy_j AS "Energy (10^10 J)", ROUND(impact_energy_kt::numeric, 3) AS "Impact (kt)" FROM neo_fireball_events ORDER BY event_date DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT 'NeoWs' AS "metric", ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM now()-MAX(ingestion_time))/3600, 1) AS "Hours Stale" FROM neo_close_approaches UNION ALL SELECT 'SBDB', ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM now()-MAX(ingestion_time))/3600, 1) FROM neo_agency_sbdb UNION ALL SELECT 'Sentry', ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM now()-MAX(ingestion_time))/3600, 1) FROM neo_agency_sentry UNION ALL SELECT 'CAD', ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM now()-MAX(ingestion_time))/3600, 1) FROM neo_agency_cad UNION ALL SELECT 'ESA', ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM now()-MAX(ingestion_time))/3600, 1) FROM neo_agency_esa

SELECT time_bucket('1 day', ingestion_time) AS "time", 'SBDB' AS metric, COUNT(*) AS "value" FROM neo_agency_sbdb WHERE ingestion_time BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() GROUP BY 1 UNION ALL SELECT time_bucket('1 day', ingestion_time), 'CAD', COUNT(*) FROM neo_agency_cad WHERE ingestion_time BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() GROUP BY 1 UNION ALL SELECT time_bucket('1 day', ingestion_time), 'NeoWs', COUNT(*) FROM neo_close_approaches WHERE ingestion_time BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT orbit_class FROM neo_agency_sbdb WHERE orbit_class IS NOT NULL ORDER BY orbit_class
list.name: orbit_class
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT orbit_class FROM neo_agency_sbdb WHERE orbit_class IS NOT NULL ORDER BY orbit_class
list.label: Orbit Class
